app.title: RotorTcpBridge
about.title: About RotorTcpBridge
main.ref_failed_msg:
Referencing {axis} could not be started.
The rotor did not respond with ACK_SETREF.

Please press «Reference» again.
settings.title: RotorTcpBridge - Settings
settings.chk_udp_ucxlog_tooltip: Listens on 127.0.0.1:12040. When 'Set Rotor' is clicked in UcxLog, the log sends UDP XML with Azimuth to drive the rotor.
settings.msgbox_az_error:
The AZ offset values could not be saved in the rotor.
Please check the connection and try again.
settings.antenna_height_tooltip:
Height of the antenna above ground (mast height).
Added to terrain elevation in the elevation profile.
settings.rf_freq_tooltip:
Transmit frequency for diffraction calculation in elevation profile (ITU-R P.526).
Examples: 144.300 MHz (2m SSB), 432.200 MHz (70cm), 1296 MHz (23cm).
cmd.title: Rotor Configuration
cmd.hint_default: Tip: Enter in PARAMS field sends the command; Enter in parameters sends Set.
cmd.hint_enter: Tip: Enter sends the current command.
cmd.msgbox_restore_done: {total} SET commands were sent to the hardware.
cmd.tooltip_current_ma_note: Input in mA (converted to mV internally, 1 A = 130 mV).
cmd.tooltip_timeout_s_note: Input in seconds (converted to/from ms internally).
cmd.tooltip_setpostimeout_s: Timeout for position move until target is reached.
cmd.tooltip_sethometimeout_s: Timeout for homing procedure until reference point.
cmd.tooltip_setiwarn_ma: Set current warning threshold. Warning only, no stop.
cmd.tooltip_setimax_ma: Set current shutdown threshold. Leads to stop + error.
log.title: RotorTcpBridge - Log
weather.title: Weather
stats.title: Statistics
compass.title: Compass
map.title: Antenna Map
elevation.title: Elevation Profile  –  {home}  →  {target}
elevation.freq_tooltip:
Transmit frequency for propagation analysis.
VHF/UHF (≥ 30 MHz): Knife-edge diffraction per ITU-R P.526.
HF (< 30 MHz): ground wave, NVIS, E- and F2-layer,
  skip zone and MUF estimate.
Common bands: 7 MHz (40 m), 14 MHz (20 m),
  144 MHz (2 m), 432 MHz (70 cm)
elevation.chk_live_tooltip:
Propagation forecast with live data from NOAA SWPC (F10.7 Solar Flux).
When checked: foF2/foE calculated from current F10.7.
elevation.obstacle_label: O b s t a c l e  h={h} m
elevation.tooltip_obstacle: O b s t a c l e at {dist} km  (+{h} m above LOS)
elevation.tooltip_no_obstacle: No o b s t a c l e on this path segment
elevation.offline_no_profile:
Elevation profile not available (no elevation data).
Band recommendation and propagation modes use default values (daily mean).
catalog.help.STOP:
Soft stop (normal braking). Ends a position move.
 Errors are NOT cleared.
catalog.help.NSTOP: Emergency stop via RS485. Immediately sets error SE_NSTOP_CMD and stops.
catalog.help.GETREF:
Query whether reference (homing) is available.
Response: 0 = not homed,
1 = homed.
catalog.help.GETPOSDG:
Current position in degrees (0.01°).
Return value is always the offset-corrected position.
catalog.help.GETIS:
Current measurement value (mV) after offset subtraction.
Selected from IS1/IS2 based on direction of movement.
catalog.help.GETTEMPA: Ambient temperature in °C. DS18B20, 2 decimal places.
catalog.help.GETTEMPM: Motor temperature in °C. If motor sensor disabled: always 0.
catalog.help.SETANEMOOF:
Set wind meter offset (km/h). Recommended: -5 to +5.
Helpful if sensor does not show 0 at calm wind.
catalog.help.GETANEMOOF:
Read wind speed offset (km/h)
(1 decimal place, e.g. -1.5). Value from NVS/Preferences key ano.
catalog.help.SETWINDENABLE:
Enable (1) / disable (0) wind evaluation.
A wind sensor must be connected to the rotor.
catalog.help.GETWINDENABLE: Read wind evaluation active status. 0 = off, 1 = on.
catalog.help.GETANEMO:
Wind speed from anemometer in km/h. 0..200 km/h,
1 decimal place, including offset.
catalog.help.GETBEAUFORT:
Wind strength as Beaufort value (0–12).
0 = calm or disabled sensor.
catalog.help.SETWINDDIROF: Set wind direction offset (degrees). Saved and applied immediately.
catalog.help.GETWINDDIROF:
Read direction offset in degrees (1 decimal place, e.g. -12.3).
Used to correct the wind direction reading.
catalog.help.GETWINDDIR:
Read calculated wind direction in degrees (0..359.9).
From load profile evaluation.
catalog.help.SETTEMPA:
Set ambient temperature warning threshold.
Value in °C. <=0 disables warning.
catalog.help.SETTEMPM:
Set motor temperature warning threshold.
Value in °C. <=0 disables warning.
catalog.help.GETTEMPAW:
Read ambient temperature warning threshold (°C).
0 disables the warning.
catalog.help.GETTEMPMW:
Read motor temperature warning threshold (°C).
0 disables the warning.
catalog.help.GETSWAPTMP:
Read temperature sensor assignment.
0 = normal, 1 = swapped.
catalog.help.SETSWAPTEMP:
Swaps the motor and ambient temperature readings.
Depending on how the sensors are detected,
the temperatures may need to be swapped.
0 = normal, 1 = swapped. Saved.
catalog.help.SETCOLDT:
Set cold threshold (°C).
Below this: extra friction allowed.
catalog.help.GETCOLDT:
Read cold threshold (°C).
Below this: extra friction allowed.
catalog.help.SETCOLDP:
Set extra friction at cold (%).
Rec.: 10..25.
catalog.help.GETCOLDP:
Read extra friction at cold (%).
Allowed addition.
catalog.help.SETCALIGNDG:
Calibration: set ramp range (degrees)
to ignore.
Rec.: 10 (test) or 30 (robust).
catalog.help.GETCALIGNDG:
Calibration: read ramp range (degrees)
to ignore.
catalog.help.SETSTATMINDG:
Statistics: set minimum movement (°).
Only movements > value count. Rec.: 30..90.
catalog.help.GETSTATMINDG:
Statistics: read minimum movement (°).
Only large moves count.
catalog.help.SETDRAG:
Set "more friction" threshold (%).
Mean for load profile. Rec.: 15..30.
catalog.help.GETDRAG:
Read "more friction" threshold (%).
Mean value threshold.
catalog.help.SETDRAGBINS:
Set proportion of bins above threshold (%).
Rec.: 30..70.
catalog.help.GETDRAGBINS:
Read proportion of bins above threshold (%).
How many angle bins must be above.
catalog.help.SETDRAGPERSIST:
Set persistence (number of moves).
How many times in a row. Rec.: 3..5.
catalog.help.GETDRAGPERSIST:
Read persistence (number of moves).
How many large moves in a row needed.
catalog.help.SETWINDPEAK:
Wind: set peak threshold (%).
For gusts. Rec.: 25..60.
catalog.help.GETWINDPEAK:
Wind: read peak threshold (%).
For gusts/short high load.
catalog.help.SETWINDCOH:
Wind: set minimum coherence (%).
How directed the load must be. Rec.: 50..70.
catalog.help.GETWINDCOH: Wind: read minimum coherence (%). How directed the load must be.
catalog.help.SETCAL:
Start calibration run (0→360→0), learn current profile.
Only when homed (REFF).
catalog.help.CLRSTAT:
Clear live statistics. Good before tests,
so only current moves count.
catalog.help.GETCALSTATE:
Calibration run status. Response: state;progress.
state: 0=IDLE,1=RUNNING,2=DONE,3=ABORT.
catalog.help.GETLOADSTAT:
Load statistics. Response: mean%;peak%;coh%;moves.
Delta from calibration.
catalog.help.GETWIND:
Wind estimate from motor load profile.
Response: peak%;coh%;dirDeg;peakDeg.
catalog.help.GETCALBINS: Read calibration bins (72 bins). Params: dir;start;count.
catalog.help.GETLIVEBINS:
Read live bins (72 bins).
Like GETCALBINS, current operating data.
catalog.help.GETACCBINS:
Fast current load statistics (72 bins).
Params: DIR;START;COUNT.
Responds faster than GETLIVEBINS.
Works without calibration.
catalog.help.SETACCBINSRST: Reset ACC bin statistics. Only the fast ACC statistics are cleared, not LIVE or calibration.
catalog.help.GETDELTABINS:
Read delta bins (live minus cal) in %.
Values can be negative.
catalog.help.GETERR:
Query current error code.
Response ACK_ERR with code or 0.
catalog.help.SETREF:
Start homing and acknowledge errors.
0 = acknowledge only,
1 = start homing.
After ERR send SETREF.
catalog.help.SETPOSDG:
Start position move in degrees.
Target angle e.g. 160.00.
For small steps increase ARRTOL if needed.
catalog.help.SETID:
Set and save slave address.
Note: assign the new address in settings afterwards.
catalog.help.SETDGOFFSET:
Set offset (degrees). Subtracted during output/control.
Typically 2.25 or 2.50.
catalog.help.GETDGOFFSET: Read offset (degrees). Subtracted during position output.
catalog.help.SETANTOFF1:
Set antenna offset 1 (0–360°).
Separate per axis (AZ/EL).
catalog.help.SETANTOFF2:
Set antenna offset 2 (0–360°).
Separate per axis (AZ/EL).
catalog.help.SETANTOFF3:
Set antenna offset 3 (0–360°).
Separate per axis (AZ/EL).
catalog.help.SETANGLE1: Set antenna beam width 1 (0–360°). Saved in rotor.
catalog.help.SETANGLE2: Set antenna beam width 2 (0–360°). Saved in rotor.
catalog.help.SETANGLE3: Set antenna beam width 3 (0–360°). Saved in rotor.
catalog.help.SETHOMEPWM:
Homing: set max PWM (%).
Fast homing PWM. Rec.: 60..100.
catalog.help.GETHOMEPWM:
Homing: read max PWM (%).
Speed during return movement.
catalog.help.SETHOMEBACKOFF:
Homing: backoff from limit switch in degrees.
Rec.: 10..60.
catalog.help.GETHOMEBACKOFF: Homing: read backoff from limit switch in degrees.
catalog.help.SETHOMERETURN:
Set return to 0 after homing.
1=yes, 0=no. Usually 1.
catalog.help.SETHOMETIMEOUT:
Homing: set timeout (ms).
If homing aborts: increase. Rec.: 60000..120000.
catalog.help.SETPOSTIMEOUT:
Set position timeout (ms).
Max. time for position move. Rec.: 30000..90000.
catalog.help.GETPOSTIMEOUT:
Read position timeout (ms).
Max. time for a position move.
catalog.help.SETHANDSPEED: Set hand speed (%). Safe slow movement. Rec.: 10..40.
catalog.help.GETHANDSPEED: Read hand speed (%). Safe slow movement (local/service).
catalog.help.SETDEADMAN: Set deadman/keepalive timeout (ms). 0=off. Rec.: 2000..5000 if master sends regularly.
catalog.help.SETIWARN: Set current warning threshold (mV). Warning only, no stop. Rec.: 200..350.
catalog.help.GETIWARN: Read current warning threshold (mV). Warning only, no stop.
catalog.help.SETIMAX: Set current shutdown threshold (mV). Leads to stop + error. Rec.: 300..600.
catalog.help.GETIMAX: Read current shutdown threshold (mV). Leads to stop + error.
catalog.help.SETARRTOL: Set arrival tolerance (degrees). How close to target. Rec.: 0.02..0.20.
catalog.help.GETARRTOL: Read arrival tolerance (degrees). How close to target.
catalog.help.SETRAMP:
Set ramp length (degrees).
Accelerate/decelerate over this angle.
Rec.: 10..40.
catalog.help.GETRAMP:
Read ramp length (degrees).
Accelerate/decelerate over this angle.
catalog.help.SETMINPWM:
Set min PWM (%). Lower limit for movement.
Rec.: 20..35. If stalling: increase MINPWM.
catalog.help.GETMINPWM: Read min PWM (%). Lower limit for movement.
catalog.help.SETSTALLTIMEOUT:
Set stall timeout (ms).
Time until SE_STALL. Rec.: 1500..4000.
If ERR16: increase.
catalog.help.GETSTALLTIMEOUT:
Read stall timeout (ms).
Time until SE_STALL triggers.
catalog.help.SETMAXPWM:
Set max PWM (%) permanently.
Global limit for position move.
Rec.: 60..100.
catalog.help.GETMAXPWM:
Read max PWM (%).
Global limit for position move.
catalog.help.SETPWM:
Set PWM limit (%) at runtime.
Without saving.
catalog.help.GETPWM:
Read currently enabled PWM limit (%).
Can be influenced by SETMAXPWM/SETPWM.
catalog.help.RESET:
Reset everything to factory defaults
and restart.
All settings will be lost.
catalog.help.SETMINSTALLPWM:
Set minimum PWM for stall detection.
Prevents stall at very low PWM.
catalog.help.GETMINSTALLPWM:
Read minimum PWM for stall detection.
Stall is checked from this PWM.
catalog.help.SETSTALLMINCOUNTS: Set minimum encoder counts in stall time window.
catalog.help.GETSTALLMINCOUNTS: Read minimum encoder counts in stall time window.
catalog.help.SETISFILTERLEN:
Set current averaging filter length.
Larger = smoother, slower. Rec.: 1..32.
catalog.help.GETFILTERLEN:
Read current averaging filter length.
Belongs to SETISFILTERLEN.
catalog.help.SETISHOLDMS:
Set current hard limit hold time (ms).
Current limit must be exceeded for this long.
catalog.help.GETISHOLDMS: Read current hard limit hold time (ms).
catalog.help.SETISGRACEMS:
Set current protection grace time (ms).
Grace period after start/reverse: hard stop ignored.
catalog.help.SETHOMESEEKPPWM:
Set additional search PWM for homing search phase.
Used when searching for the first limit switch.
catalog.help.GETHOMESEEKPPWM:
Read additional search PWM for homing search phase.
Used when searching for the first limit switch.
catalog.help.SETENCCRI:
Set counts per 360° ring encoder.
Typically approx. 160000. Saved.
catalog.help.GETENCCRI:
Read counts per 360° ring encoder.
Integer for scaling.
catalog.help.SETENCCAX:
Set counts per 360° axis/motor encoder.
Typically approx. 50000. Saved.
catalog.help.GETENCCAX:
Read counts per 360° axis/motor encoder.
Integer for scaling.
catalog.help.SETENCTYPE:
Set encoder variant.
1 = Axis/Motor, 2 = Ring. Check counts/homing after change.
